title: Week 5 Gold EA Update: Trade open… then came the long, boring wait
author: Loose-Object-8913
selftext:
Man, this week was the perfect reminder of why I built this EA in the first place.

Trade fired off exactly as planned. Clean structure breakout on the H1, everything lined up. Then… nothing. Price just parked itself in this fat range for hours (you can see it on the chart I attached). No momentum, no drama, just crickets.

Back in my manual trading days this is exactly where I used to blow up. I’d get antsy, either yanking the trade early for a tiny profit or forcing stupid adds just to feel like I was “doing something.” Zero patience.

The EA? Zero emotion. It just sat there, held the position like it was told to, and waited. No revenge trades, no second-guessing, no nothing. Eventually the move came back, price broke out, and it did exactly what it’s supposed to do.

Nothing fancy, no crazy win, but honestly? That’s the point. Most of trading is just waiting, and the system is finally proving it can handle the dead periods way better than I ever could.

Attached the chart so you can see the whole thing play out.

Full breakdown and voiceover in the video here if you want the nitty gritty:

https://youtu.be/Nnv1KkHsAWQ

Still tweaking and learning every week. On to week 6.
